Container.Name: project-regional-status
Container.Overview: Regional Status Dashboard - Interactive map showing branch locations with geocoding and site details. Upload Excel files and view all sites on a map with search and filtering capabilities.
Container.Description:
Project Regional Status Dashboard
Features: - Interactive map with site locations - Drag-and-drop Excel file upload - Automatic address geocoding - Search and filter sites - Responsive design for desktop and mobile - Local storage for Google Maps API key - Site details panel with full information
Setup: 1. Access the dashboard at http://[IP]:3000 2. Enter your Google Maps API key (free with $200/month credit) 3. Upload your Excel file with branch/site data 4. View all locations on the interactive map
Supported columns in Excel: - Branch Name / Site Name - Address - Phone / H/Phone PC - Contact / Pengurus - Installation Date - Any other custom columns
For more info: https://github.com/bridgenetlab/project-regional-status
